title: acmella paniculata
intro: Acmella paniculata, also known as the "buzzing bee plant" or "parlor plant," is a tropical plant native to South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Acmella paniculata include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to improve oral health by reducing gum inflammation and killing bacteria. Acmella paniculata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
